response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 10+ years across web, backend, embedded, and DLang systems, plus recent MCP/agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated production GenAI delivery, RAG/vector database experience, cloud-platform AI system design, or customer-facing technical leadership at the Staff FDE level. AI work appears nascent (under a year) rather than the 8+ years of shipping AI solutions the role requires.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Current exposure to MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Track record of technical leadership: workshops, talks, mentoring, and founding GISCollective
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI-driven solutions — AI experience appears recent and limited
Missing RAG, vector database, and LLM evaluation/observability experience called out as required
No demonstrated major cloud-platform AI system design (AWS CDK at Optilyz is infra, not AI) or customer-facing FDE/discovery experience
